title: Elevated Plus Maze
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"72r66","text":"The elevated plus maze is used to measure anxiety-like behavior in rodents, and to assess the anxiolytic effects of pharmacological compounds. Time in the open arms of the maze reflects anti-anxiety-related behavior.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"bmfln","text":"Perform this experiment in a dimmed and quiet room with at least 2 people.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"3ua9r","text":"Set up the elevated plus maze.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"vwzbj","text":" ","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"dd2b1","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"image","mutability":"","data":{"guid":"61A1ED42341F11EE9D4302C0B41BC903","height":289.80727272727285,"is_video":false,"legend":"{\"blocks\":[{\"key\":\"ctuga\",\"text\":\"Elevated plus maze.\",\"type\":\"unstyled\",\"depth\":0,\"inlineStyleRanges\":[],\"entityRanges\":[],\"data\":[]}],\"entityMap\":{}}","mime":"image/png","nestedSelector":null,"original_name":"Screen Shot 2020-06-30 at 2.22.46 AM.png","placeholder":"https://content.protocols.io/public/2c377001f608a41ac9db7d90a0f389d4306dcaa3482f8226dc8a0f36d7b3bd3b/cdde8996.png","shadow":false,"source":"https://content.protocols.io/public/2c377001f608a41ac9db7d90a0f389d4306dcaa3482f8226dc8a0f36d7b3bd3b/cddd8996.png","width":422.79575596816994}}}}
steps: Place rat in center of elevated plus maze and set the timer to 5 minutes.

Use stopwatch to record the amount of time spent in open arms. In addition, tally the number of entries into each arm (open or closed). At least 3/4 of the rat's body must enter the arm to count as time spent in that arm.
Clean the maze with quatricide before testing the next rat. Make sure to clean the maze in between each rat.
Place the rat back in its home cage.
After 5 minutes is up, calculate and write down the total amount of time spent in open arms and the total amount of time spent in closed arms.
creator: Lani Tieu
